title: amaranthus roxburghianus var. aschersonianus
intro: Amaranthus roxburghianus var. aschersonianus, also known as Ascherson's amaranth, is a variety of the Amaranthus roxburghianus plant, a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ascherson's amaranth include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically done by drying the leaves and stems, and then using them to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
